scripts.build: npm run build -w @carapace/core && npm run build -w @carapace/adapter-openclaw && npm run build -w @carapace/adapter-mcp && npm run build -w @carapace/adapter-langchain
scripts.test: npm run test -w @carapace/core && npm run test -w @carapace/adapter-mcp && npm run test -w @carapace/adapter-langchain
